_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop and implement network backup and recovery procedures.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-021 (AI, cosine: 0.442), OP-T-007 (OP, cosine: 0.432).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.490). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [backup, develop, implement, network, procedures, recovery] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, application, causes, code, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.884, R=0.841). P exceeds R by 0.042 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (88.2%). The model interprets "Develop and implement network backup and recovery procedures." as logically implying aspects of "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.460 ≈ STS 0.490 (gap 0.030). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.1%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [backup, develop, implement, network, procedures, recovery]. WIDAI terms: [ability, across, application, causes, code, data].
